title: Trump’s Friendship With Japan’s Leader Takaichi Faces Test Over Iran
summary_full: In Washington on Thursday, President Trump is expected to press Sanae Takaichi for military help in the Strait of Hormuz. But she faces constraints on what she can offer.
summary_public: In Washington on Thursday, President Trump is expected to press Sanae Takaichi for military help in the Strait of Hormuz. But she faces constraints on what she can offer.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: military help in the Strait of Hormuz
